mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, compressing valuation multiples and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 5.0% within a single month, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger risk-off positioning, depressing S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day forward returns in more than 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in industrial production and a decline in real personal savings rates indicate synchronized demand-supply weakness, which compresses corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative 60-day returns with a directional accuracy exceeding 55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-interest-rate environment, a month-over-month decline in housing starts reduces construction activity and consumer confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Housing starts declines do not produce statistically significant negative 20-day forward returns when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.0% (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index rises by more than 0.4% month-over-month, it signals accelerating inflation that forces the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity valuations and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL monthly increases above 0.4% do not lead to negative 5-day forward returns in more than 40% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate coupled with declining nonfarm payrolls indicates a broadening labor market contraction, which reduces aggregate consumption and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: The combined UNRATE and PAYEMS signal fails to predict negative 60-day returns with a directional accuracy exceeding 55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Sequential quarterly growth in real GDP reflects expanding economic activity that supports corporate revenue growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in GDP growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the industrial production index falls below 100.0, it signals manufacturing sector weakness that reduces corporate profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO values below 100.0 do not produce negative 5-day forward returns in more than 40% of observations.
